creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

Feedback timeout (6 months).  To submitter: if you are able to retest this with 
a newer version of FreeBSD (ideally 7.0 or 7.1 when it is releases) and find it 
still doesn't work, we can reopen this report.  Note that we will need at least 
a copy of your dmesg and the output of "pciconf -lv" before there's any hope of 
diagnsing this problem.
